problem id: cb7c2230
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(3) XOR SHR(7)) AND ROT(3)

examples:
  00100011 -> 00011000
  00000101 -> 00101000
  00011001 -> 11001000
  10110001 -> 10001001
  11011001 -> 11001000
  10110000 -> 10000001
  10011000 -> 11000000
  11000001 -> 00001000
  01110110 -> 10110000

query: 11010100
predicted answer: 10100000
